responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX project media mixing (Perez showing Casa Rosario photos), restore landing reels, create one canonical project data source ‚Äî AND eliminate all fake deployment narratives by enforcing an evidence-first 12-state deployment state machine with 18 required evidence fields, plus repair the orchestrator so completed tasks must actually reach production ‚Äî then push, deploy, and verify end-to-end on production.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/` (also `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`)
- Public landing live at `https://ivxholding.com` (S3 bucket, deployed via `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` using AWS credentials)
- Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence; no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- **Mandatory deployment state machine (owner spec 2026-07-11)**: REPO_FROZEN‚ÜíCODE_CHANGED‚ÜíFILES_MODIFIED‚ÜíLOCAL_BUILD‚ÜíTESTS_PASSED‚ÜíCOMMIT_CREATED‚ÜíPUSH_COMPLETED‚ÜíDEPLOY_STARTED‚ÜíDEPLOY_IN_PROGRESS‚ÜíDEPLOY_COMPLETED‚ÜíHEALTH_CHECK_OK‚ÜíPRODUCTION_VERIFIED ‚Äî no state may be skipped
- **Prohibited narrative phrases** (blocked unless backed by real evidence): "Deployment successful", "Build completed", "Changes applied", "Production updated", "Health check passed", "Live on Render", "Successfully deployed", "Fix complete"
- **Forbidden evidence values**: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED ‚Äî any field containing these ‚Üí FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED
- **18 required evidence fields**: repository, branch, commitSha, previousCommitSha, filesChanged, linesAdded, linesRemoved, pushStatus, deploymentPlatform, deploymentId, deploymentStatus, deploymentTimestamp, productionUrl, healthEndpoint, httpStatus, runningCommitSha, runtimeVersion, verificationTime + qaResult
- **Six-point completion checklist (owner spec 2026-07-11)**: git commit exists, push completed, deployment started, deployment completed, health endpoint HTTP 200, production running latest commit ‚Äî ANY unmet ‚Üí NOT_DEPLOYED
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key ‚Äî only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift ‚Äî cannot preview React Native app from sandbox
- User demands real production evidence; any missing proof must be marked UNVERIFIED
- User is extremely frustrated with repeated credential requests (24 times in project history) ‚Äî must NOT request credentials again unless truly unrecoverable

## Progress
### Done
- **ALL code fixes COMPLETE, committed to workspace repo HEAD `70e0af2`, 895/895 tests pass**:
  - Full backend test suite: **895 pass, 0 fail, 3,319 expect() calls, 77 files**
  - Token resolver tests: **13 pass, 0 fail, 36 assertions** (includes exact production scenario: PLACEHOLDER env + real stored token)
  - Typecheck of changed files: **0 errors** (only pre-existing `@/types` alias errors in expo/constants, `pg` types missing)

- **Orchestrator repair ‚Äî COMPLETE and tested**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-completion-gate.ts` ‚Äî NEW: `BlockCompletionEvidence` type, `NO_DEPLOYMENT_EVIDENCE` constant, `resolveBlockCompletionStatus()` ‚Äî six-point checklist, returns VERIFIED or NOT_DEPLOYED with failure list; pure + deterministic
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-completion-gate.test.ts` ‚Äî NEW: 11 tests covering full evidence, no evidence, fake commit SHA, push/deploy/health failures, production commit mismatch
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-orchestrator.ts` ‚Äî block status driven by six-point checklist; `finalizeTaskStatus` requires ALL blocks VERIFIED for `completed`, otherwise `not_deployed`; `isTerminalTaskStatus` includes `not_deployed`; summary includes `notDeployedBlocks`; `deploymentStatus` set to `deployed_verified` or `NOT_DEPLOYED`
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-orchestrator.test.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: test isolation via `IVX_TASKS_ROOT` temp dir; tests now expect `not_deployed` for blocks without deployment evidence; new test for VERIFIED-only completion path; tests for NOT_DEPLOYED blocks settled and reported in `remainingIssues`
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-state-store.ts` ‚Äî `'not_deployed'` added to `IVXTaskStatus`, `'NOT_DEPLOYED'` to `IVXTaskBlockStatus`, `SETTLED_BLOCK_STATUSES` includes NOT_DEPLOYED, `tasksRoot()` overrideable via `IVX_TASKS_ROOT` env var
  - `backend/services/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` ‚Äî `completeTask()` now evidence-gated; `OrchestratedTask.status` includes `'not_deployed'`; KPIs include `notDeployedTasks` count; imports `resolveBlockCompletionStatus` + `NO_DEPLOYMENT_EVIDENCE`

- **Reclassification script ‚Äî RAN, 45 tasks reclassified**:
  - `backend/scripts/reclassify-undeployed-tasks.ts` ‚Äî one-shot script: scanned 60 task dirs, reclassified 45 `completed`‚Üí`not_deployed`, 165 blocks reclassified COMPLETED/DEPLOYED‚ÜíNOT_DEPLOYED, `TASK_RECLASSIFIED_NOT_DEPLOYED` event appended to each; 0 tasks had real evidence; idempotent

- **GitHub token placeholder bug ‚Äî ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED, FIX CODE COMPLETE (not pushed to GitHub)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-github-token-resolver.ts` ‚Äî NEW: `isCredibleGithubToken()` rejects placeholder/non-token-shape values; `resolveGithubToken()` tries env first (only if credible), falls back to encrypted Owner Variables store; `ensureGithubTokenHydrated()` writes good value back to `process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN` (60s TTL cache); clears placeholder env values when no replacement found
  - `backend/services/ivx-github-token-resolver.test.ts` ‚Äî NEW: 13 tests including exact production scenario
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-variables.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `isForbiddenEvidenceValue`; `getIVXOwnerVariableRuntimeValue()` rejects forbidden/placeholder env values and falls through to encrypted store; NEW `getIVXOwnerVariableStoredValue()` reads store only
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/github-tool.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; calls it before `getToken()` in `ghRequest()` and `verifyPermissions()`
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/credential-sync.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; GITHUB_TOKEN validation uses resolver, reports source
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/production-evidence.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; token via `(await ensureGithubTokenHydrated()).token`
  - `backend/services/ivx-enterprise-deployment-engine.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; `discoverCredentials()`, `getGitHubHeadSha()`, `pushToGitHub()` all use resolver; `CredentialReport.source` includes `'owner_variables'`
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-chat-brain.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; `resolveGitHubSha()` and `/platform-status` handler use resolver
  - `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `ensureGithubTokenHydrated`; `readGithubCreds()` uses resolver
  - Root cause: Render service env var `GITHUB_TOKEN` was set to literal "PLACEHOLDER" (11 chars) ‚Äî non-empty garbage sent to GitHub API verbatim ‚Üí 401, while real encrypted token sat unused in `ivx_owner_variables`

- **Render placeholder REMOVED ‚Äî DONE**:
  - Render env var GITHUB_TOKEN (len:11, isPlaceholder:true) DELETE via API: **HTTP 204**
  - Confirmed: GITHUB_TOKEN_VARS_REMAINING=0 (no duplicates)
  - Deploy triggered: dep-d98qpe9o3t8c73ebd8b0, status progressed build_in_progress ‚Üí update_in_progress ‚Üí **live**
  - BUT: deploy used OLD code (commit d35db8b9, no resolver) ‚Üí production `/api/ivx/deploy-tools/github` now returns `{"ok":false,"error":"GITHUB_TOKEN not configured"}` (empty env, old code has no fallback)

- **Stored token DECRYPTED and TESTED against GitHub ‚Äî CONFIRMED REVOKED**:
  - Decrypted locally using same key derivation as backend (sha256 of JWT_SECRET, AES-256-GCM, AAD `ivx_owner_variables:v1`): **DECRYPT:OK len:40 shape_ok:true prefix:ghp_******
  - GitHub `/user` endpoint: **HTTP 401** login:null scopes:n/a
  - GitHub `/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`: **HTTP 401** fullName:null permissions:null
  - Rork backend bridge (`https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/api/ivx/deploy-tools/github`): `githubTokenPresent:true`, `githubTokenMask:[REDACTED]****QTOt`, `githubTokenIsPlaceholder:false` ‚Äî same token, also fails
  - All 15 Owner Variables rows confirmed in Supabase with `status:saved`, all `last_tested:null`

- **IVX IA gate fix ‚Äî COMPLETE (NOT deployed)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` ‚Äî blocks placeholders unconditionally, blocks DEPLOYED/LIVE/VERIFIED claims without evidence
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` ‚Äî gate wired at line 567 in `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` (all 26 answer paths)
  - `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` ‚Äî placeholder rejection
  - `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` ‚Äî 8 forbidden markers + 7 deployment narrative markers

- **Deployment state machine ‚Äî COMPLETE, 96/96 tests pass**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.ts` ‚Äî 12-state machine, `advanceDeploymentState()`, `FORBIDDEN_EVIDENCE_VALUES` (13 values), `isForbiddenEvidenceValue()`, `DeploymentEvidenceReport` (18 fields + qaResult), `validateDeploymentEvidence()`, `formatDeploymentReport()`, `isRealCommitSha()`, `commitShasMatch()`
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.test.ts` ‚Äî 96/96 PASS (269 assertions)

- **Media/reels code fixes ‚Äî COMPLETE (NOT deployed to production DB or landing)**:
  - `expo/constants/deal-photos.ts` ‚Äî PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS replaced with 8 correct Supabase storage URLs
  - `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` ‚Äî all 4 fallback arrays replaced; localStorage cache integrity guard; hardcoded ownership_text removed; Perez sale_price corrected to 3125000; reels section added
  - `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` ‚Äî NEW migration: `jv_deal_media` + `jv_deal_reels` tables with FK to `jv_deals(id)`, data corrections, `ivx_project_integrity` view; Casa Rosario tour reel seed
